column1: I want to buy a camera ... costs 10.000 dollars.
This is the house ... belongs to Julie.
I can’t find the ruler ... was on the desk.
We like fruit ... our grandma gives us.
The people ... live on the island are very kind.
This is the boy ... sold the goat.
This is the man ... lives in New York.
I’m going to meet a woman ... called me yesterday.
She is the girl ... laughs all the time.
